title: hieracium pravum
intro:
Hieracium pratense (also known as Hieracium pratense or Hieracium pseudopratense) is actually known as Hieracium pratense  -  not  Hieracium pravum. However, the Hieracium genus is commonly known as Hawkweed. 

Hieracium pratense is a type of flowering plant belonging to the dandelion family (Asteraceae) and is native to Europe and Western Asia. The plant has been used in traditional medicine for centuries, and its medicinal properties include anti-inflammatory, antiseptic, and antimicrobial properties. The health benefits of Hieracium pratense include reducing inflammation and relieving pain, as well as supporting the immune system and promoting wound healing. Herbal preparations of Hieracium pratense can be made into teas, infusions, and tinctures, and it is often used in combination with other herbs to enhance its medicinal effects.
